title: NuclearCraft Project
body:
NuclearCraft



ANNOUNCEMENT: From now on the server will work only on RUS/UA and the modpack will be only for Minecraft version 1.12.2.



Welcome to NuclearCraft — a modpack that brings industrialization, mechanization, automation, and realism to your Minecraft world, with a pinch of magic! This modpack is perfect for those who love technical mods and want to experience a new level of gameplay.

Key Mods:

HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod - Extended Edition: Adds nuclear technology and weapons.
Refined Storage: Provides enhanced storage and item management.
Applied Energistics 2: Energy-based automation and storage systems.
BuildCraft: Machines, pipes, and automation.
Aroma1997's Dimensional World: A new dimension for convenient mining.
JEI (Just Enough Items): Convenient recipe viewing.
Journey Map: A full-featured world map.
OpenComputers: Computers and robotics.
CC: Tweaked: Lua-programmable computers and robots.
SecurityCraft: Additional security features.
Thermal Dynamics: Pipes and transport systems for items and fluids.

Features:

Support: You will always have support from the administration and community through our Discord server.
Dedicated Server: Join our dedicated server to play with other community members.

Gameplay Changes: 

The modpack will drastically change the gameplay, adding many new possibilities and technologies. With the inclusion of advanced nuclear technology from HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod, you can experiment with powerful reactors and weapons, transforming the way you approach energy production and defense.

Refined Storage and Applied Energistics 2 bring sophisticated storage and automation systems, allowing you to efficiently manage and access your resources. BuildCraft and Thermal Dynamics add complex machinery and piping systems, enabling extensive automation and industrial processes.

Aroma1997's Dimensional World provides a new dimension dedicated to mining, making resource gathering more efficient and less intrusive to your main world. With JEI, you have an easy way to view and navigate through crafting recipes, simplifying the creation process.

Journey Map offers a comprehensive map of your world, making exploration and navigation more intuitive. OpenComputers and CC: Tweaked introduce programmable computers and robots, adding a layer of tech-savviness and customization to your gameplay.

SecurityCraft enhances your base's security, providing tools and systems to protect your assets from threats. The combination of these mods creates a highly dynamic and engaging experience, challenging you to master new technologies and strategies.

Whether you're automating complex industrial setups, exploring new dimensions, or defending your base with advanced security measures, NuclearCraft offers a rich and varied gameplay experience that will keep you engaged for hours.

What is planned to be added in the future?

FTB Quests for single player



The modpack was created by Bufka2011 with community support.
